text:
The department may make available, in a publicly accessible area of a driver’s license office, informational materials and videos on bone marrow donation that are developed by an appropriate entity, as determined by the department.

Redesignated from Transportation Code, Section 521.0062 (Information on Driving with Autism) by Acts 2019, 86th Leg., R.S., Ch. 467 (H.B. 4170 ), Sec. 21.001(67), eff. September 1, 2019.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 521. Driver's Licenses & Certificates
##### § 521.0063 — Information on Bone Marrow Donation

The department may make available, in a publicly accessible area of a driver’s license office, informational materials and videos on bone marrow donation that are developed by an appropriate entity, as determined by the department.

Redesignated from Transportation Code, Section 521.0062 (Information on Driving with Autism) by Acts 2019, 86th Leg., R.S., Ch. 467 (H.B. 4170 ), Sec. 21.001(67), eff. September 1, 2019.

*Added by Acts 2017, 85th Leg., R.S., Ch. 1078 (H.B.3359), Sec. 1, eff. September 1, 2017.*
